name_cn:
👏New Fabric Crossbody Bag👏1BC073/Large Tote Bag
This leather mini shoulder bag features a minimalist design. The front metal triangle logo adds a signature touch. Equipped with a removable/adjustable logo-printed fabric strap, it looks very beautiful on 😘😘 showcasing a modern style. High-end fashion, a staple for daily outfits. Grab yours now, it's so beautiful 👏👏
30L x 28H x 12W cm 👏👏👏
